title: Heammojávri
summary: Heammojávri (or historically: Hæmmujávri) is a lake in Kautokeino Municipality in Finnmark county, Norway. The 10.9-square-kilometre (4.2 sq mi) lake is part of the river Kautokeinoelva, along the European route E45.
text: Heammojávri (or historically: Hæmmujávri) is a lake in Kautokeino Municipality in Finnmark county, Norway. The 10.9-square-kilometre (4.2 sq mi) lake is part of the river Kautokeinoelva, along the European route E45.
